name: PER_SEC_CON_V
query: SELECT c.person_id, c.contact_person_id as contact_id FROM per_contact_relships_f c WHERE c.effective_start_date = (SELECT MIN(effective_start_date) FROM per_contact_relships_f c1 where c1.contact_relationship_id=c.contact_relationship_id) and not exists (SELECT 1 FROM PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PS WHERE PS.PERSON_ID=c.CONTACT_PERSON_ID)
